description: §41.14.1 — formFor's for= must be a :struct type. An enum type fires E-FORMFOR-TYPE-NOT-STRUCT.
rationale: §41.14.1: for= SHALL be a bare scrml-native :struct type identifier; enum/named-shape/refinement/generic/arbitrary type expressions are rejected with E-FORMFOR-TYPE-NOT-STRUCT (mirrors schemaFor/tableFor).
